raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags several factual problems with the cited literature, but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Hannun et al., 2014) and articulates the delta, but the novelty claim is overstated and not supported by evidence.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, including issues with Guo et al. (2017) and Park et al. (2025).",
    "RX.1": "The output presents all claims as equally confident without marking uncertainty or missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stays within the scope of the artifact, but with one drift in the discussion of downstream applications.",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors and fabrications (e.g., misdescription of Hannun et al., 2014) that degrade end-to-end reliability.",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, and blends sources without traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.2,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.5,
    "RX.5": 0.3
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags several factual problems with the cited literature, but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (Hannun et al., 2014) and articulates the delta, but the novelty claim is overstated and not supported by evidence.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, including issues with Guo et al. (2017) and Park et al. (2025).
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all claims as equally confident without marking uncertainty or missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within the scope of the artifact, but with one drift in the discussion of downstream applications.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors and fabrications (e.g., misdescription of Hannun et al., 2014) that degrade end-to-end reliability.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, and blends sources without traceability.
